svg.title: Hamster task complete loop v1
svg.desc: Task-complete hamster celebrates with a left-right happy hop while a task-list clipboard tells the story: empty list pops in, three checkboxes tick off fast, the list settles into one big soft-green check, confetti bursts once and golden stars ramp in then twinkle. The board stays fixed near the upper right and swings gently around its own top clip instead of following the hamster body. v2 replaces the v1 standalone giant checkmark (鹿鹿 2026-06-12, reverse-port of mini-happy board theater).

g.data-desc: hamster short tail, circle; resting at body center (behind belly), revealed by turn pages sliding sideways
